message:
Merge PR #1354: feat(dashboard): add mail threading to inbox

Groups mail messages by thread/reply-to chain in inbox view with
expand/collapse for multi-message threads.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1354
Author: rod-nxtlevel (Rodrigo Fernandez)
Co-authored-by: slit <rodrigo@nxtlevelsaas.com>
